description: Canonical, provider-agnostic tone/writing core shared by the BlackCEO writing skills (52 brand, 53 book, 54 anthology). Blended tone + four tone-style analyzers + shared writing rails. ZERO Anthropic model ids; the client's own TIER models resolve these at runtime.

na_autopick_resolver.rule: F4.3 — an N/A tone slot is routed through the canonical 5-layer selector (deterministic, avatar/task-aware, LOGGED to persona_selection_log), NOT a raw prompt-level 'pick a well-known person' instruction. CLIENT-NAMED slots are NEVER touched (client sovereignty). The 4-slot blend at stage 08 is unchanged. Skill 53's fictional palette is an explicit fallback tier.

tone_stages.repair: R1: consumes the four tone-style ANALYSIS documents (artifact.04..07), not raw names

sync_check: each consumer bakes a lockstep copy of prompts/04..08 into its own prompts/ and proves the copy matches this canonical source at build/CI time (verify-tone-core-sync.py).
provider_rule: client's own providers only; G-NOANTHROPIC bans /anthropic|claude/i at runtime.
